fundamentals.name: Snowflake Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Snowflake Inc. provides a cloud-based data platform for various organizations in the United States and internationally. The company's platform includes artificial intelligence (AI) Data Cloud, which enables customers to consolidate data into a single source of truth to drive meaningful business insights, build data applications, and share data and data products, as well as applies AI for solving business problems. It serves financial services, advertising, media and entertainment, retail and consumer goods, healthcare and life sciences, manufacturing, technology, telecom, travel and hospitality, and government and defense industries, as well as the public sector. the company has a collaboration with OpenAI, L.L.C. for the development of AI solutions for joint enterprise customers that deliver tangible return on investment. The company was formerly known as Snowflake Computing, Inc. and changed its name to Snowflake Inc. in April 2019. Snowflake Inc. was incorporated in 2012 and is based in Menlo Park, California.

judgment.summary: High-growth company with strong revenue and free cash flow, but currently unprofitable and trading at a high valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 17.8%; next earnings date is 2026-05-27.
positives: Revenue growth 30.1% YoY, with analyst estimates projecting 43.5% for the current fiscal year.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $1.59B indicates strong cash generation capabilities.
Gross margin of 67.2% is healthy, suggesting efficient service delivery.
Consensus analyst rating is 'buy' with a mean target price significantly above the current spot price.
negatives: Operating margin of -33.2% and profit margin of -28.4% indicate the company is not yet profitable.
Forward P/E of 73.53 and PEG ratio of 4.82 suggest a very high valuation.
Debt/Equity ratio of 142.46 is substantial, indicating significant leverage.
Return on equity of -53.9% and return on assets of -9.9% show poor returns on capital.

news.paragraph: Snowflake's AI data platform is gaining federal attention with a new OneGov deal, as reported by Simply Wall St. The company is also nearing its Q1 earnings report, with analysts expecting substantial growth. Traders should monitor the upcoming earnings release for any catalysts that could impact the stock, especially given the recent focus on its federal government dealings.
